title: Cobblemon 3D Poke Rods
description: 3D Models for all of Cobblemon's 1.6 Poké Rods
body:
# Poké Rods, now available in jaw-dropping 3D!

Using [CanineGray](https://modrinth.com/user/CanineGray)'s excellent 3D fishing rod model from his [3D items resource pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/grays-3d-items), I textured all the Poké Rods added in the latest update of Cobblemon.

I tried my best to translate the color schemes that the official team used in their sprites, but the result obviously isn't perfect.

Adapted from a model by [CanineGray](https://modrinth.com/user/CanineGray) in respect of the original license.

Optifine is **not** required

**Cobblemon 1.6 is required**, otherwise this pack does nothing.
